metadataCCMod.title: CrossCode Ultrawide
metadataCCMod.description: Renders CrossCode at an ultrawide aspect ratio by widening the internal render viewport. This gives a genuinely wider field of view (you see more of the world) instead of a stretched image, and supports pixel-perfect integer scaling. Works on desktop and the cc-ios iOS wrapper.

metadataCCMod.title: CrossCode Aim Assist
metadataCCMod.description: Controller aim assist — locks the center of your throw aim onto a nearby enemy when you aim close to it, without affecting bullet spread. Toggle and tune it in the in-game Assists menu. Works on desktop and the cc-ios iOS wrapper.

metadataCCMod.title: cc-ios Title Buttons
metadataCCMod.description: Adds native Restart Game and Close Game buttons to the title-screen menu when running inside the cc-ios iPhone/iPad wrapper. On desktop CrossCode it is a deliberate no-op (the desktop build already has a native Close button), so it stays safe to install everywhere.
